name: command-center
description: Job search dashboard + optional local Cheerio scraper (npm start runs both)

scripts.start: concurrently -k -n web,scrape -c blue,magenta "npm run start:web" "npm run start:scraper"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,scrape,discovery -c blue,magenta,green "npm run start:web" "npm run start:scraper" "npm run start:discovery-worker"
scripts.apps-script:create: node scripts/clasp-helper.mjs create --type standalone --title "Command Center discovery webhook"
scripts.setup:auto: npm run install:repo && npm run discovery:bootstrap-local
scripts.test:contract:all: npm run test:contract && npm run test:ats-contract && npm run test:pipeline-contract && npm run lint:skills
scripts.test:repo: npm run test:contract:all && node --test tests/*.test.mjs && npm run test:browser-use-discovery
scripts.typecheck:repo: node --check app.js && node --check discovery-coach.js && node --check discovery-payload.js && node --check expired-review.js && node --check dev-server.mjs && node --check discovery-wizard-local.js && node --check discovery-wizard-probes.js && node --check discovery-wizard-relay.js && node --check discovery-wizard-shell.js && node --check discovery-wizard-verify.js && node --check settings-tabs.js && node --check settings-profile-tab.js && node --check user-content-store.js && node --check resume-bundle.js && node --check resume-generate.js && node --check document-templates.js && node --check scripts/run-scheduled-discovery.mjs && node --check scripts/run-scheduled-expired-cleanup.mjs && node --check scripts/install-expired-cleanup-schedule.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall-expired-cleanup-schedule.mjs && node --check scripts/install-repo.mjs && node --check scripts/doctor.mjs && node --check server/index.mjs && node --check server/job-scraper.mjs && node --check server/ats-request-payload.mjs && node --check server/ats-scorecard.mjs
